/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatserver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/chatservice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/db/db.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/usermodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/offlinemessagemodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/friendmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/model/groupmodel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/redis/redis.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ChatServer.dir/__/__/test/test.cpp.o -o /home/linxiao/chat-cabin/chatserver-main/bin/ChatServer   -L/home/linxiao/build/release-install-cpp11/lib  -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linxiao/build/release-install-cpp11/lib:/usr/local/lib -lmuduo_net -lmuduo_base -lmysqlclient -lpthread /usr/local/lib/libhiredis.so
